instruction: Classify the traveler's request into a booking intent.
baseline_prompt: You are a travel-booking assistant. Classify the traveler's request into a booking intent. Classify into one of these categories: flight, hotel, car_rental, cancellation, itinerary, loyalty.
source: Authored for TEI-Bench (Sonnet-generated, Sonnet-validated; kept only label-agreed examples).

train.query: Looking for the cheapest nonstop option between Miami and Chicago O'Hare for next month, any dates work.
Can you help me find accommodation for two adults and one child in downtown Seattle next weekend? We'd like a room with two beds.
Looking for the cheapest option to get wheels while I'm in Miami next month. I'll need it from the airport for about 5 days.
I want to undo my recent booking from three days ago. My plans have changed completely and I won't be traveling after all. How do I get reimbursed?
Show me everything booked under my account for the Hawaii vacation. My partner wants to know when we're arriving and departing.
What tier do I need to reach to get free checked bags and priority boarding? I'm currently at Silver level and wondering how many more segments I need.
My current reservation has me connecting through Dallas but I'd prefer a direct route if possible, can we update that?
We need to change our room type at the Grand Hyatt from a standard king to a suite if anything's available for our dates.
Can you help me find an automatic transmission vehicle available in downtown Seattle for the weekend? I'll be arriving Friday afternoon.
I'd like to withdraw my booking for the 15th through the 20th. Will I be able to recover the amount I paid or is there a fee?
Can you show me what flights and hotels I have coming up next month? I need to check the dates.
I'm about to book a rental for next month and want to make sure my member number is attached so I get credit for it.
What are the available seats on the 2:30pm departure to San Francisco? I need an aisle seat in economy.
Looking for a budget-friendly place to sleep near the airport in Miami for one night on June 3rd, just need something clean and simple.
I need to reserve a mid-size SUV for pickup at LAX on March 15th and return it on March 22nd. What are my options?

test.query: My family emergency means I can't go anymore. Please help me terminate my reservation and let me know about getting my funds returned.
Can I get a summary of my upcoming business trip arrangements? I need to forward the schedule to my colleague who's meeting me there.
Hi, I noticed my account shows 45,000 miles but I should have earned an additional 5,000 from my last trip to Tokyo. Can you help me figure out what happened?
Can you help me find tickets from JFK to London Heathrow for two passengers departing March 15th?
I'm searching for a beachfront resort in Cancun with an ocean view room for our honeymoon, checking in July 10th for five nights.
I need ground transportation sorted out for my business trip to Austin. Preferably something with GPS included, picking up on the 3rd.
Hi, I'm not going to be able to make it to my destination next month. Can you help me reverse my booking and process a refund to my credit card?
I need to look at my complete travel plans for next week - all the flights, times, and confirmation numbers in one place.
Can you check if my recent hotel stays have been credited to my account? I stayed three nights in Chicago last week and the bonus promotion should have applied.
I need to get from Boston to Seattle next Wednesday, preferably leaving in the morning and returning Friday evening.
I need a place to stay in Barcelona from March 15th to March 20th, preferably near the beach with a pool and breakfast included.
Can you check availability for a van or large vehicle that can fit 7 passengers? We're going to Orlando and need it for the whole week.
Something came up and I have to call off my entire trip to Barcelona. What's the process for getting rid of my reservation and getting my payment back?
What's on my schedule for the Vegas trip? I want to see if I can extend my stay by one more night.
Do these reward certificates I have expire? I've got a few saved up and want to use them before they're no longer valid.
I want to change my departure time from 6am to something later in the afternoon, the red-eye is too early for me.
Do you have any recommendations for where to stay in Paris during the first week of April? We want something romantic in a central location.
What's the daily rate for a compact vehicle in Boston? I'm flying in Tuesday morning and need it until Friday evening.
